heading: Attributes
body:
It has the following attributes:

> **Note:** The `edgeGram` tokenizer yields multiple output tokens per word and across words
> in input text, producing token graphs.
>
> Because [tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete) field type mapping definitions
> and analyzers with [Synonym](synonyms-ref) mappings only work when used with
> non-graph-producing tokenizers, you can't use a custom analyzer with
> [edgeGram](edgeGram-tokenizer-ref) tokenizer in the `analyzer` field for
> [tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete)
> field type mapping definitions or analyzers with [Synonym](synonyms-ref) mappings.

| Name    | Type    | Required? | Description                                                                       |
| ------- | ------- | --------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| type    | string  | yes       | Human-readable label that identifies this tokenizer type. Value must be edgeGram. |
| minGram | integer | yes       | Number of characters to include in the shortest token created.                    |
| maxGram | integer | yes       | Number of characters to include in the longest token created.                     |
